prompt: A soft, airy anime portrait of a delicate young woman in a minimalist off-white background, shown from the chest up in a close three-quarter view. She has long, slightly wavy {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown with ash-gray highlights"} hair with wispy strands and straight-cut bangs, tied on one side with a large black ribbon bow. Her eyes are large, glossy, and pale gray with detailed lashes and a dreamy, distant expression. She rests her cheek against one hand, with slender fingers partly covering her face and muted gray nail polish visible. She wears a white off-shoulder blouse with voluminous sleeves, soft ruffles, gathered fabric, and thin black ribbon ties on the sleeves, creating a gentle monochrome contrast. Add a single long, elegant gold drop earring with a small pearl on the visible ear. Use a clean manga-inspired illustration style with light linework, subtle blush tones, soft cel shading, and painterly highlights in the hair. The mood is quiet, wistful, and feminine, with a refined fashion-illustration feel and a very limited palette of white, black, taupe, and gray.
translatedPrompt: 一张柔和、轻盈的动漫肖像，描绘了一位精致的年轻女性，背景为极简的米白色，采用胸部以上的四分之三侧面特写视角。她留着长而微卷的 {argument name="hair color" default="深棕色配灰褐色挑染"} 头发，发丝轻盈，留着齐刘海，一侧系着一个巨大的黑色蝴蝶结。她的双眼大而有神，呈浅灰色，睫毛细节丰富，流露出梦幻而遥远的表情。她单手托腮，纤细的手指半掩面庞，指尖涂着柔和的灰色指甲油。她身穿白色露肩衬衫，袖口蓬松，带有柔和的荷叶边和褶皱设计，袖子上系着细细的黑色丝带，营造出柔和的单色对比感。在可见的耳朵上增加一枚简约优雅的金色长款珍珠耳坠。采用干净的日漫插画风格，线条细腻，带有淡淡的腮红、柔和的赛璐珞阴影以及如油画般的发丝高光。整体氛围安静、忧郁且充满女性魅力，具有精致的时装插画质感，配色仅限于白色、黑色、灰褐色和灰色。

breakdown.creativeCore: 柔和单色动漫少女肖像：此提示词可生成一张时尚的动漫少女特写肖像，非常适合用作头像、角色插画或优雅的社交媒体视觉素材。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime, manga, minimalist]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
